title: GTE: Misc
description: GregTech Modern addon which adds features that don't fit any of my other mods
body:
# GiriTech Energies' Miscellanea division GiriTech Energies prides itself in it's modular yet coherent nature
Despite it's name, Energies offers a wide variety of additons
- Anything from esoteric energy production setups...
- To (hopefully...) well researched, realistic-flavoured (yet not tedious!) chemical lines...
- To fantasy materials with exotic ways to obtain them...
- To cool and unique resource generation options...
- To complex and interesting automation challenges...
----- **GTE: Misc currently adds the following features, with many more (un)planned** - Casting of Single-use Tools
